examples: So his marginalia are not very revealing.
There were a lot of books to sell. She checked them warily for yellow notes, and found only marginalia.
A sidenote detection of the source code, to learn to understand marginalia have a good reference value.
Ms Jackson wishes ostensibly to alert scholars and librarians to the importance of marginalia.
For all the shrill noise of his scrawled marginalia, Mr Twombly's tone can often be very grand and stentorian.
